notes: Repo-local placement under data/orius_av/raw/<dataset_key>/ is the default contract.
ORIUS_EXTERNAL_DATA_ROOT remains an optional fallback for the same directory names.
Full raw payloads stay outside git history.
Prepared tabular exports derived from official raw files may be placed under either approved source layout.
Synthetic AV data remains available only by explicit request.
Path A bridge (ego-only 1D speed-limit semantics) is live. Path B (2D RSS collision-gap) is the next stage and will supersede the Path A legacy-schema outputs when complete.
